# A3M Router
> LLM router with 99.5% ±1 tier routing accuracy without ML. Drop-in OpenAI proxy, 40 providers, semantic cache, guardrails. TypeScript SDK, Python SDK, CLI, REST API.

## Benchmark Results
- **64.5% exact tier match**, **99.5% ±1 tier accuracy** (200 queries, 4 tiers)
- **61.6% cost savings** vs premium-only routing
- Multi-signal classifier: domain detection, complexity scoring, action verbs, qualifiers
- RouteLLM-inspired methodology, self-benchmarked

## Install
```bash
npm install adaptive-memory-multi-model-router   # TypeScript/Node
pip install a3m-router                            # Python
npx a3m-router serve                              # Proxy at localhost:8787
```

## Interfaces
- **TypeScript SDK:** `import { A3MRouter } from 'adaptive-memory-multi-model-router/sdk'`
- **Python SDK:** `from a3m import A3MRouter`
- **CLI:** `npx a3m-router route/serve/benchmark`
- **Proxy:** OpenAI-compatible at `localhost:8787/v1`
- **REST API:** `POST /v1/route`, `POST /v1/chat/completions`, `GET /v1/models`

## Key Metrics
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Exact routing accuracy | 64.5% |
| ±1 tier accuracy | 99.5% |
| Cost savings | 61.6% |
| Providers | 40 |
| Package size | 19.5 KB gzipped |
| ML/GPU required | No |

## 40 Providers
- **Free:** Groq, Cerebras, Ollama, LM Studio, CommandCode, vLLM, LocalAI
- **Cheap:** DeepSeek, MiniMax, Mistral, Qwen, GLM-4
- **Mid:** Google Gemini, Cohere, Together AI
- **Premium:** OpenAI GPT-4o/o3, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini Ultra

## Features
- OpenAI-compatible proxy (drop-in for any SDK)
- Multi-signal routing (domain, complexity, verbs, qualifiers)
- Semantic cache (trigram Jaccard similarity)
- Security guardrails (PII, prompt injection)
- Cost analytics dashboard
- Circuit breaker with automatic fallback
- Batch processing with rate limiting

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/Das-rebel/adaptive-memory-multi-model-router
- npm: https://www.npmjs.org/package/adaptive-memory-multi-model-router
